# ARCHITECTURE.md — angular-user-search
*Generated by Layer 0 prompt. Reviewed and corrected manually.*

## App Identity
Standalone Angular 17 application with a single feature: search users from JSONPlaceholder
by name, username, or email with debounced input and explicit loading, error, and empty states.

## Architecture Pattern
Feature-per-folder, standalone components. No routing, no state library, no UI library.
One inbound interaction (user types in input). One outbound call (HTTP GET to JSONPlaceholder).
All filtering is client-side — JSONPlaceholder has no search endpoint.

## Data Flow
```
User types in search input (300ms debounce)
  → UserSearchComponent.filterUsers()
    → filters this.users array client-side
    → updates this.filteredUsers
    → Angular renders updated list

On ngOnInit:
  → UserSearchComponent.loadUsers()
    → UserService.getUsers() [external: JSONPlaceholder]
    → sets this.users and this.filteredUsers (all users initially)
    → sets this.loading = false
    → on error: sets this.error, this.loading = false

User clicks Retry:
  → UserSearchComponent.retry()
    → calls loadUsers() again
```

## Key Components
| Component / Service | Owns |
|--------------------|------|
| `UserSearchComponent` | All search state: users, filteredUsers, loading, error |
| `UserService` | HTTP GET to JSONPlaceholder — no filtering logic |
| `User` (interface) | Shape of a JSONPlaceholder user object |

## Folder Structure
```
src/app/
├── models/user.model.ts        User interface
├── services/user.service.ts    HTTP layer
└── user-search/                Feature folder
    ├── user-search.component.ts     State + logic
    ├── user-search.component.html   Template
    ├── user-search.component.scss   Styles
    └── user-search.component.spec.ts Tests
```

## Architectural Decisions
- **No async pipe:** Loading and error states require local properties. An async pipe cannot
  distinguish "loading" from "loaded empty". Explicit `loading`, `error`, `filteredUsers`
  properties are cleaner and more testable.
- **Client-side filtering:** JSONPlaceholder returns all 10 users. No server search endpoint
  exists. Filtering in the component avoids extra HTTP calls for a fixed small dataset.
- **No state library:** Single component, single data source. NgRx/Akita would add ceremony
  with no benefit at this scale.
- **Standalone components:** Angular 17 default. No NgModule needed for a demo app of this size.

## Design Constraints
- Do not add server-side filtering — JSONPlaceholder has no search endpoint
- Do not use async pipe for the main data stream — loading/error state requires local props
- Do not add NgModule — standalone components only
- Do not add routing — single-component demo
- Do not add UI component libraries — plain HTML + SCSS only
